items.label: Java Concurrency: Threads, Locks & Concurrent Utilities
Java I/O: Streams, NIO & I/O Models
JVM Internals: Memory, GC & Class Loading
Java New Features: Java 8 through Java 21+

intro.title: Welcome
intro.description: Welcome to the internal engineering knowledge base. Browse the sidebar to explore topics on architecture, backend development, and event-driven patterns.

technical-knowledge/java/java-collection.title: Java Collections Framework: Deep Dive
technical-knowledge/java/java-collection.description: A comprehensive guide to Java's Collections Framework — data structures, common implementations, internal mechanics, and best practices.

technical-knowledge/java/java-concurrenc.title: Java Concurrency: Threads, Locks & Concurrent Utilities
technical-knowledge/java/java-concurrenc.description: A comprehensive guide to concurrent programming in Java — from thread basics and synchronization primitives to advanced utilities like CompletableFuture and virtual threads.

technical-knowledge/java/java-fundamenta.title: Java Fundamentals: Core Language Concepts
technical-knowledge/java/java-fundamenta.description: A comprehensive guide to Java's foundational concepts — from the platform architecture to core syntax, OOP principles, and essential language features every developer should know.

technical-knowledge/java/java-interview-.title: Java Interview Questions & Answers
technical-knowledge/java/java-interview-.description: A curated collection of Java interview questions and answers organized by topic and difficulty level. Questions are drawn from real interview scenarios and cover core Java through expert-level topics.

technical-knowledge/java/java-io.title: Java I/O: Streams, NIO & I/O Models
technical-knowledge/java/java-io.description: A guide to Java's I/O system — from classic stream-based I/O and design patterns to NIO channels/buffers and the five I/O models.

technical-knowledge/java/java-jvm.title: JVM Internals: Memory, GC & Class Loading
technical-knowledge/java/java-jvm.description: A guide to the Java Virtual Machine — runtime memory areas, garbage collection algorithms and collectors, class loading, and monitoring tools.

technical-knowledge/java/java-new-featur.title: Java New Features: Java 8 through Java 21+
technical-knowledge/java/java-new-featur.description: A practical guide to the most impactful features introduced in modern Java versions — from lambdas and streams (Java 8) to virtual threads and pattern matching (Java 21).

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-complete.title: Kafka: The Complete Guide
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-complete.description: Apache Kafka is a distributed event-streaming platform designed for high-throughput, fault-tolerant, real-time data pipelines and streaming applications. This guide covers the core concepts every new learner needs to understand.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-connect.title: Kafka Connect
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-connect.description: Kafka Connect is a framework for streaming data between Apache Kafka and external systems (databases, key-value stores, search indexes, file systems, etc.) using reusable connectors.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-exactly-.title: Configuring Exactly-Once Semantics in Kafka
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-exactly-.description: Exactly-once semantics (EOS) ensures that every message is delivered and processed exactly once — no duplicates, no data loss. This guide covers how to configure EOS across producers, consumers, Kafka Streams, and Kafka Connect.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-parallel.title: Parallel Consumer in Kafka
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-parallel.description: Standard Kafka consumers process messages sequentially per partition — one message at a time per assigned partition. This becomes a bottleneck when downstream processing is slow (e.g., HTTP calls, database writes). Parallel consumers break this limit by processing multiple messages concurrently within a single partition.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-streams.title: Kafka Streams: Topology & Branching
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-streams.description: Kafka Streams is a lightweight client library for building real-time stream-processing applications on top of Apache Kafka. This guide covers its programming model, the topology concept, and branching patterns.
